sources.name: wordfreq
sources.what: Word-frequency data for Dutch (Zipf scores), built from subtitles, Wikipedia, news, books and more.

sources.name: simplemma
sources.what: Dutch lemmatization dictionary, used to map inflected words back to their dictionary form.

sources.name: Wiktionary (via kaikki.org)
sources.what: Dutch noun genders — the de/het article shown with each noun — parsed from Wiktionary by wiktextract.
